expectations.text: The output is saved to outputs/generated/prd.json.
branchName is derived from the feature title.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Workspace Member Management",
  "branchName": "workspace-member-management",
  "description": "Enable admins to invite, manage roles, revoke access, and review membership audit history.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add membership audit-log persistence",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want membership changes stored as audit events so that administrative actions are traceable.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Create audit-log storage for membership events including actor, target member, action, and timestamp",
        "Define event types for invite_sent, role_changed, and access_revoked",
        "Tests pass",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "db/migrations/*membership-audit*",
        "src/db/schema/membership_audit.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Invite workspace members by email",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to invite members by email so that new collaborators can join without database edits.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Provide admin action to create an invitation for a valid email address",
        "Invitation flow assigns requested role (viewer, editor, or admin) and sends invite notification/email hook",
        "Successful invite writes invite_sent membership audit event",
        "Tests pass",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/workspace/members/invite*",
        "src/components/workspace/settings/InviteMemberForm.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Change workspace member roles",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to change member roles so that access level matches responsibilities.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Provide admin action to change role between viewer, editor, and admin",
        "Role changes update membership record and enforce role enum validation",
        "Successful role change writes role_changed membership audit event",
        "Tests pass",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/workspace/members/updateRole*",
        "src/components/workspace/settings/MembersTable.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Revoke workspace member access",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to revoke member access so that former collaborators no longer access workspace data.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Provide admin action to remove member workspace access by membership id",
        "Revocation removes access immediately from authorization checks",
        "Successful revocation writes access_revoked membership audit event",
        "Tests pass",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/workspace/members/revoke*",
        "src/components/workspace/settings/MembersTable.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Show recent membership changes in settings audit view",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to review recent membership changes on the settings page so that I can audit who changed access.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Workspace settings page renders recent membership audit events sorted newest first",
        "Audit view shows action type, actor, target member, and timestamp columns",
        "Audit view limits to workspace scope and paginates or caps result count for performance",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/workspace/members/auditQuery*",
        "src/components/workspace/settings/MembershipAuditLog.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover invite, role change, revoke access, and audit-log or audit-view work.

expectations.text: No story title is a horizontal layer split such as build backend or build frontend.
